note: NightI LowBaseHighDynamic: keep NightH no-inward clips and URDF, lower lateral base/margin, keep strong foot-dependent outward extra, and relax roll symmetry/pitch-down constraints so lateral walking can show more dynamic arm motion. Command: Night I：回到 NightH NoInwardBoundary 的 400 轮冻结腿基线；保持 roll 不内收边界，把侧移基础外展从 0.11 降到 0.06、min margin 从 0.07 降到 0.035，同时保留更大的脚步 extra，让侧走时呈现低基础、高动态外展摆动。
